enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his failing HP laptop (daily crashes, broken USBs, memory errors) and explains why he's been absent from vlogging — he's been obsessively working on his website. He describes redesigning the site multiple times, his 'time no object' attitude toward the project, and briefly mentions seeing Edge of Tomorrow and needing to bike to work.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Willing to take as long as needed, even years, because the end result will be worth it
Building it wrong first is sometimes necessary to figure out the right approach
Frustrated but managing with workarounds until he can use a backup computer
